particles.title: Particle Lab
particles.lead: Particles mark each word's role. Tap them off and see what the sentence loses.

explore.tap_hint: Tap a particle to toggle it. Tap the legend for its full card.
explore.nuance_generic: Several particles off: telegram style — common in spoken banmal, odd in writing.

popover.single_form: Single form: it doesn't change with 받침.

drill.blocked_consonant: “{noun}” ends in a CONSONANT (받침) → it needs {expected}.
drill.blocked_vowel: “{noun}” ends in a VOWEL (no 받침) → it needs {expected}.
drill.saved_to_diary: Saved to your Diary with this explanation.
drill.diary_note: You picked {choice} in the Particle Lab.
drill.summary_garden_note: Your garden grew: 은/는 and 이/가 progress updated.

particles.sheet_section_body: This grammar is a particle: toggle it inside real sentences to feel what it adds.

onboarding.title: Plant your first sentence
onboarding.intro: In mungarden you write Korean sentences yourself. Let's do the first one together — just fill in the blank.
onboarding.prompt: Complete the sentence using this pattern:
onboarding.celebrate: Your first seed is planted. 화이팅!

empty.title: Your garden is bare soil
empty.body: Plant your first Korean sentence to grow your first tree.

stats.empty: No stats yet — write a few sentences in Practice and your garden's story starts here.

mastery.title: Mastery across TOPIK 1–6
mastery.sub: Each level's grammar, seedling → plant → tree.

errors.data_failed: Couldn't load your data. Check your connection and try again.
errors.fatal_body: Sorry — the garden hit a snag. Try reloading, or head back home.

practice.deck_lead: Each deck is a TOPIK level. Shuffle, draw 3 cards and write 9 sentences. 화이팅! 💪
practice.deck_tap_hint: Tap the cards to reveal your hand
practice.deck_all_revealed: Hand complete — all 3 cards are revealed.
practice.error_note_placeholder: e.g. unsure whether to use 이 or 가...
practice.completion_text: 9 sentences saved — 3 grammar × 3 contexts. Draw another hand?
practice.no_grammars: Not enough grammar items in the active decks.
practice.no_contexts: You need at least 3 active contexts.

custom.name: Deck name
custom.need_six_hint: Pick at least 6 grammar points to play
custom.confirm_delete: Delete this deck? This can't be undone.
custom.empty_hint: Pick the grammar you want from any level, name it, and play.

library.lead: All the grammar points that can show up in your card draws. Each one grows as you practice.

coming_soon.audio: Pronunciation audio is coming soon. 화이팅!
coming_soon.examples: More example sentences are coming soon.
coming_soon.achievements: Achievements you can earn with this grammar are coming soon.
coming_soon.usage_notes: Detailed usage notes for this grammar are coming soon.

search.placeholder: Search a pattern or its meaning…

empty.log: No sentences yet. Head to Practice.

auth.magic_link_sent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.callback_error: Sign-in link is invalid or expired.
auth.sign_out_error: Couldn't sign out. Please try again.
auth.reset_email_sent: Check your email for a reset link.
auth.reset_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
auth.reset_error: Couldn't update your password. Please try again.

daily_goal.title: Daily goal
daily_goal.label: Plants to tend each day
daily_goal.hint: Miss a day? Mulch keeps your streak.

custom_grammar.title: Your own grammar
custom_grammar.subtitle: Add patterns from your real life — they show up in practice like the rest.
custom_grammar.meaning_placeholder: e.g. giving a reason or background
custom_grammar.delete_confirm_body: “{ko}” will be removed from your patterns.
custom_grammar.empty: No patterns of your own yet. Plant your first below.

contexts.title: Practice contexts
contexts.subtitle: Pick which situations show up in practice.
contexts.error_korean: Use a Korean name, e.g. 반말.
contexts.error_duplicate: A context with this name already exists.
contexts.min_active_hint: Keep at least 3 active to practice.
contexts.delete_confirm_body: “{name}” will be removed from your contexts.

data.title: Data & privacy
data.export_error: Couldn't export your data. Please try again.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Permanently delete your account and all your data. This can't be undone.
danger.modal_body: This permanently deletes your account, your sentences, progress, decks, and custom grammar. This cannot be undone.
danger.error: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

email.title: New email
email.hint: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address.
email.sent: Confirmation link sent — check your new inbox.
email.error: Couldn't update your email. Please try again.

dialog.intro_day: Welcome to the garden. The sun is up; the grammar grows.
dialog.intro_night: The sky is purple. The grammar still grows. 화이팅.
dialog.email: Whisper your e-mail to the gatekeeper.
dialog.magic: A scroll will be sent by carrier owl.
dialog.error_oauth: That gateway is closed. Try another door.

goal.label: Today: {count}/{goal}
goal.aria: Daily goal: {count} of {goal} plants tended today.

garden.tree_locked: Reach {pct}% in level {n} to plant this tree

weather.rain_hint: Review your tricky sentences to clear the sky

particles.name: 조사 LAB · Particles
particles.desc: Toggle particles on and off to see how the sentence changes. Beat the 은/는 vs 이/가 clash.

games.lead: Pick your practice mode. Each game grows your Korean in a different way.

ruleta.name: The Deck
ruleta.desc: Pick your TOPIK deck, shuffle and draw 3 cards. Write 9 creative sentences.

escape.name: Escape Room
escape.desc: Solve grammar puzzles to escape little Korean stories.

third.desc: A third game is sprouting in the greenhouse…

games.exit_confirm_body: You'll lose your progress in this round.

escape.book_lead: Flip through the notebook and pick your story.
escape.game_over_text: Three stumbles. The door locks again — but the house remembers you. Try again with fresh notes.
escape.creation_help: Tap the tiles in order to build the sentence
